extra.reason: Shipped: per-session Claude config isolation via a claude wrapper + CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR seeding + init-time snapshot + zshrc git-author. Acceptance met both arms: prose bullets observable-green; harness Signal green (21/21 assertions, exit 0) own-shell-verified against a fresh cold cage on the rebuilt image — concurrent-race proof, isolation, MCP set-equality-vs-base, R4 regression guard, single-agent no-regression, git-author, and the shared-config negative control (clobber detected). Two fresh-context adversarial-review rounds converged (impl-review REVISE→folded; R4-confirming REVISE→folded doc/observability). Folded R4 (snapshot not live single-file mount) + R2 (mcp-needs-auth-cache isolated) from a parallel live-cage probe. Commits 858b949, 169e102, fc13746, bf657ab. Follow-up rip-cage-xvb filed for stale test-integration.sh:92-93. /compound ran (3 Record folded, 0 Promote).

Fixed via option (b): issues.jsonl is a lagging derived export by design (auto-export structurally can't run in a memory-bearing repo — shrink guard). Recorded read-authority rule (bd show/list authoritative; flush via bd export --all -o) in global ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (all repos), global adversarial-review brief, and rip-cage CLAUDE.md + config.yaml. Reconciled vestigial no-db flag (ADR-007 D5).

Shipped: net-new `rc agent <cage> --name=<handle> -- <command>` mechanical lever (opaque verbatim tmux-new-session pass-through via "${cmd_args[@]}" array forwarding; duplicate-name surfaces tmux error non-zero without clobber; zero policy/intelligence per ADR-006 D7/ADR-002), reusing existing rc sessions/--kill/attach. NEEDS_CONTAINER e2e tests/test-multi-agent-levers.sh (wired into run-host.sh) green against a real cage — exit 0, all 5 assertions: verbatim pass-through, membership-enumerate, selective kill, duplicate-refusal, two-pi concurrency proof via capture-pane matching pinned pi-ready marker 'escape interrupt' in BOTH panes. rc schema/usage + --output json allowlist updated (ADR-003 D5). ADR-006 D7 verified already-correct (session granularity + presence-only) — no edit. CURRENCY: rip-cage-p1p closed since design → 'Claude concurrency OUT/gated' framing superseded (delivered by p1p; rc agent --name -- claude inherits isolation for free); acceptance reworded, harness stays pi-only by design. Stale line refs corrected (schema 8265→8189, init 458→479, swallow 3800→3799). Impl adversarial-review: REVISE→fixed (schema/runtime --output-json allowlist gap + Step-3 sentinel gate)→converged. /compound fired: 1 L2B memory recorded.

Agent Directory Check now classifies every *.md agent file: readable (PASS), host-only broken symlink with target outside cage roots (SKIP+rationale, like host-only skill symlinks), or genuinely corrupt — broken symlink targeting inside a cage root or unreadable non-symlink (still FAIL). Iterates all agents, not just the first. Harness: new host-side fixture suite tests/test-agent-readability.sh (17 assertions) proves all three branches + the suite-level 0-failures contract for an all-dotpi-symlink cage; wired into run-host.sh, BSD/GNU-portable (pure-bash normalization, no realpath -m). Fresh-context adversarial-review: core classification + portability + dual-path sourcing PASS; REVISE on a phantom-PASS output-integrity defect and a test-honesty gap — both fixed (reporting decision factored into shared helper + asserted at the reporting layer; inversion sanity-check confirms the new tests bite). verdict:pass. Shipped via isolated worktree to avoid colliding with rip-cage-swv (disjoint files), ff-merged to main commit 48bc3c2.

Shipped: concurrent two-pi agent_mail round-trip proven live. Two distinct concurrently-live pi agents via rc agent (openrouter provider); agent A sends via 'am mail send' over pi's bash tool while B iteratively polls 'am mail inbox' (≥2 pi-driven invocations) and reads A's exact body — body-EQUALITY on a unique per-run sentinel. pi-native (am CLI over bash, no MCP, no Claude). Harness: tests/test-agent-mail-concurrent.sh (NEEDS_CONTAINER + RC_E2E), own isolated fixture, exits non-zero on failure. Fresh-context adversarial review PASS after two REJECT rounds folded (pi-no-MCP premise; pi-as-launcher false-green). Follow-ups filed: rip-cage-gucm (doc-fix), rip-cage-9yg0 (PI_VERSION), rip-cage-0wbk (ADR promote).

ADR authored. ADR-019 D9 (FLEXIBLE) added: bash-only agents reach in-cage daemons via the daemon's own CLI over bash, not MCP — full predicates (rationale, alternatives w/ warrant tags, what-would-invalidate, canonical_refs). ADR-005 D7 IN-CAGE-DAEMON wording reconciled in place: mcp_fragment serves MCP-capable agents (Claude) only; bash-only agents (pi) use the daemon CLI. INDEX.md row + cross-refs updated. Firmness path: FLEXIBLE (announce+proceed, human-greenlit). Files: docs/decisions/ADR-019-pi-coding-agent-support.md, ADR-005-ecosystem-tools.md, INDEX.md.

Doc-fix shipped: docs/reference/agent-mail-daemon.md now documents the am CLI message surface (am mail send/inbox/read + am agents register, flags verified against tests/test-agent-mail-concurrent.sh), the two reach paths (MCP-capable agents via mcp_fragment vs bash-only agents via the am CLI), and the daemon-mode -32002 gotcha (mcp-agent-mail serve forbids CLI mutating calls; am serve-http --no-auth is the CLI-friendly mode). Cross-refs ADR-019 D9 + ADR-005 D7. Existing content preserved.

Decision: PI_VERSION stays latest (user wants fresh pi; pinning rejected). Bounded the safety risk with a content-based guard-parity re-verify check in tests/test-pi-dcg-gate.sh section 5 (5a positive sentinel: bash.js dist has bashSchema+command field; 5b: no alternative exec-field name in bash schema; 5c: allToolNames parsed-set sentinel + unexpected-tool drift). FAIL altitude, fires only on real exec-surface drift (not harmless version bumps), reachable via rc test. Sentinel-gated + hardened against vacuous pass (5c validates against the PARSED Set, fails-closed if the dist format changes / parse yields no bash). Fire-tested: fails on missing-file/renamed-schema/renamed-field/alt-field/new-tool/multi-line-Set; passes on real pi 0.73.1 (confirms guard premise still holds past the old 0.70.2). ADR-019 D8/D9 reconciled: states pi tracks latest with this tripwire, no longer implies a pinned version. shellcheck clean.
